Troubleshooting
===============

If the power station does not operate as expected, refer to the following guidelines.

Device Not Powering On
----------------------

Possible causes:

- Battery is completely discharged
- Power button not pressed properly

Solution:

- Recharge the device
- Press the power button again

No Output Power
---------------

Possible causes:

- Output port disabled
- Overload protection activated

Solution:

- Check the output settings
- Remove excessive loads

Charging Issues
---------------

Possible causes:

- Incorrect charging cable
- Power source unavailable

Solution:

- Verify cable connections
- Check power supply source

.. note::

   If the issue persists, contact customer support.
